results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    new_node_name = 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_8'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, name=new_node_name, type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a3.m2', new_node_name, type='RK_CONTAINS')
    json_data = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': json_data,
        'updated_graph': json_data
    }
